WPEPlatform

API Version: 2.0

Library Version: 2.52.1

Type
Gamepad
Virtual methods
start_input_monitor stop_input_monitor

Generated by gi-docgen 2023.3

Virtual Method

WPEPlatformGamepadstart_input_monitor

Declaration [src] 

void
start_input_monitor (
  WPEGamepad* gamepad
)

Description [src]

Start monitoring input on gamepad. Signals WPEGamepad::button-event and WPEGamepad::axis-event will not be emitted until this function is called.
